2603.21341.title: RoboAlign: Learning Test-Time Reasoning for Language-Action Alignment in Vision-Language-Action Models
2603.21341.paper_summary: Improving embodied reasoning in multimodal-large-language models (MLLMs) is essential for building vision-language-action models (VLAs) on top of them to readily translate multimodal understanding into low-level actions. Accordingly, recent work has explored enhancing embodied reasoning in MLLMs through supervision of vision-question-answering type. However, these approaches have been reported to result in unstable VLA performance, often yielding only marginal or even negative gains. In this paper, we propose a more systematic MLLM training framework RoboAlign that reliably improves VLA performance. Our key idea is to sample action tokens via zero-shot natural language reasoning and refines this reasoning using reinforcement learning (RL) to improve action accuracy. As a result, RoboAlign bridges the modality gap between language and low-level actions in MLLMs, and facilitate knowledge transfer from MLLM to VLA. To validate the effectiveness of RoboAlign, we train VLAs by adding a diffusion-based action head on top of an MLLM backbone and evaluate them on major robotics benchmarks. Remarkably, by performing RL-based alignment after SFT using less than 1\% of the data, RoboAlign achieves performance improvements of 17.5\%, 18.9\%, and 106.6\% over SFT baselines on LIBERO, CALVIN, and real-world environments, respectively.
2603.21341.paper_summary_zh: 改善多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）中的具身推理對於在其基礎上構建視覺-語言-行動模型（VLAs）至關重要，以便能夠迅速將多模態理解轉化為低級行動。<lb/>因此，最近的研究探討了通過視覺-問題-回答類型的監督來增強MLLMs中的具身推理。然而，這些方法被報導會導致VLA性能不穩定，通常僅產生邊際甚至負的增益。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一個更系統的MLLM訓練框架RoboAlign，該框架能可靠地改善VLA性能。我們的關鍵想法是通過零-shot自然語言推理來採樣行動標記，並使用強化學習（RL）來精煉這一推理，以提高行動準確性。<lb/>因此，RoboAlign彌合了MLLMs中語言與低級行動之間的模態差距，並促進了從MLLM到VLA的知識轉移。<lb/>為了驗證RoboAlign的有效性，我們通過在MLLM骨幹上添加基於擴散的行動頭來訓練VLAs，並在主要的機器人基準上進行評估。<lb/>值得注意的是，通過在SFT後進行基於RL的對齊，使用不到1\%的數據，RoboAlign在LIBERO、CALVIN和現實世界環境上分別實現了相對於SFT基準17.5\%、18.9\%和106.6\%的性能提升。
2603.21341.author: Dongyoung Kim et.al.
2603.21341.authors: Dongyoung Kim, Sumin Park, Woomin Song, Seungku Kim, Taeyoung Kim, Huiwon Jang, Jinwoo Shin, Jaehyung Kim, Younggyo Seo
